category_sources: source_facts.description says MirBSD Korn Shell; source_facts.homepage is the official mksh page.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands mksh as MirBSD Korn Shell; source_facts.name provides the executable/package short name mksh.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official mksh project page; official MirBSD manpage and FAQ are the expected documentation surfaces for mksh.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage/source archive distribute release tarballs, while the visible Evolvis Git URL is a Debian packaging VCS, so no upstream official source-control repository URL is returned.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official mksh homepage/manpage identify it as the MirBSD Korn Shell for command interpretation and scripting.
